title: NoeticBraid Obsidian hub write policy settings
description: Contract 1.3.0 write policy settings schema. This settings object is not a vault note and intentionally has no nb_type or contract_version property.

schema_version.description: Obsidian hub settings schema family version.

vault_root_env.description: Environment variable placeholder for the private vault root.

namespace.description: Vault namespace label, not a path. Must not be an absolute path or credential. Must not contain secrets, tokens, cookies, API keys, or DPAPI blobs.

allowlist_relative_roots.description: Allowed relative vault roots. Items must be POSIX-style relative directories, must end with /, and must reject parent traversal and absolute paths.

denylist_relative_globs.description: Denied relative vault glob patterns. Items must reject parent traversal and absolute paths.

default_write_mode.description: Default write mode is fail-closed dry_run.

generated_overwrite_allowed.description: Generated files may be overwritten when all policy gates pass.

non_generated_overwrite_allowed.description: Non-generated stable records must not be overwritten.

atomic_write_intent.description: Writers must intend atomic write semantics.

user_dropzone_read_relative_root.description: Optional user dropzone relative read root. Must end with / and must reject parent traversal and absolute paths.

append_only_heading_policy.description: Append-only updates are limited to status and decision note headings.

sync_log_relative_path.description: Optional sync-log relative path. Must reject parent traversal and absolute paths. Must not be an absolute path or credential. Must not contain secrets, tokens, cookies, API keys, or DPAPI blobs.

optional_integrations.description: Optional integration settings; no secret reader or credential material is defined by this contract.
